lex.botalias.audiologsetting.CfnAbout: Settings for logging audio of conversations between Amazon Lex and a user. You specify whether to log audio and the Amazon S3 bucket where the audio file is stored.

lex.botalias.audiologsetting.Destination.Description: The location of audio log files collected when conversation logging is enabled for a bot.

lex.botalias.audiologsetting.Enabled.Description: Determines whether audio logging in enabled for the bot.
